topic: Setting Up and Managing Transport Data
summary: This topic explains the requirement for detailed transport data, including bus numbers, associated pickup points/stoppages, and student assignments to specific routes, to accurately manage transport fees and logistics within the ERP.
steps: Provide comprehensive transport data to the ERP team in a specified Excel format.
Include details such as bus numbers, all associated pickup points or stoppages for each bus, and the division of students assigned to specific buses/routes.
The ERP team will use this data to configure and set up the transport module.
business_rules: Transport fees can vary based on distance or route (e.g., different rates for Faridabad vs. Delhi).
Transport fees can be divided into multiple installments (e.g., four parts).
important_notes: Detailed transport data (bus numbers, pickup points, and student assignments) is crucial for the effective operation of the transport module.
The ERP team will provide a sample Excel format for submitting transport data.
The institution needs to provide this data, potentially through a transport in-charge, as bus-wise student division may not be readily available in existing systems.
questions: What specific data is needed to set up the transport module in the ERP?
How are transport fees managed based on different routes or distances?
Can the ERP track student assignments to specific buses and stoppages?
Will the ERP team provide a sample Excel format for transport data?
